allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Switch preview to same-window mode — no split *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Enable mouse wheel scrolling in the native pager \(less --mouse\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add ASCII art headers as default style, keep boxed as option *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add requirements.txt and update README with full documentation *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Switch to rich-pyfiglet for gradient ASCII art headings *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Surface figlet errors to stderr instead of swallowing them *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Implement gradient with plain pyfiglet + manual ANSI interpolation *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Scale down header fonts: standard/small/mini instead of ansi_shadow *)
